{{Infobox character
| name = Carmine
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Carmine is a human residing in [[Sarcoline City]]. He appears to be experiencing significant physical and emotional distress, characterized by trembling hands, pale skin, and a state of agitation that fluctuates between fury and despair. He has suffered the loss of his home due to an attack by monsters, an event that has left him deeply traumatized. Carmine is currently facing various challenges described as tests, including a combat test involving a new batch of entities. Despite expressing intense fear and a lack of confidence in his own abilities, he displays a desperate desire to see certain enemies defeated, even if it comes at his own expense.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sixteen-year-old Carmine is a lanky boy with messy black hair, typically dressed in clothing consisting of red and black shades. After the monsters of [[Eternity Incorporated]] destroyed his home, he was found shaking amidst broken glass. The group rescued him from the wreckage while he tightly clutched [[Kelthryss]]. Following his rescue, [[Ziel]] provided him with a list of survivors.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]] is a sixteen-year-old boy with messy black hair and long, lanky limbs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]]'s clothes are in shades of red and black.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]]'s home was destroyed by [[Eternity Incorporated]]'s monsters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]] was rescued by the group.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]] was shaking and surrounded by broken glass.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]] clutches [[Kelthryss]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Carmine]] is given a list of survivors by [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel pulled the folded paper from his jacket and pressed it into Carmine’s hands. “Here’s the list of survivors.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
